chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-885 of 2012 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 01.09.2022 Mr. Safdar Ali Laghari associate of Mr. Muhammad Arshad S. Pathan advocate for petitioner. Mr. Zaheeruddin Sahito advocate for respondents No.6, 9 & 10/SBCA. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, A.A.G. ----- The main controversy in this petition is that petitioner, a builder, submitted all relevant documents for approval of Revised Plan of subject building before authorities of Sindh Building Control Authority and respondent No.9 Assistant Director, Sindh Building Control Authority, Hyderabad Region, which, despite various directions by this court,has not been decided and any orderpassed thereon. In terms of last order, respondent No.9 was directed to be present in person but Mr. Zaheeruddin Sahito has submitted that due to surgery of his wife he has not been able to come today. In any case, we dispose of this petition along with pending applications with direction to respondent No.9 and all relevant officials to pass an order on the application of the petitioner filed for approval of Revised Plan within 15 days in accordance with law and submit compliance report. If within stipulated time the application is not decided, the relevant officials would be exposed to contempt proceedings to be initiated on a proper application filed in this regard. Let a copy of this order be communicated to respondent No.6 Regional Director, Sindh Building Control Authority, Hyderabad, for compliance. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
